homepage.headline: Record once. Observe live. Recover from evidence.
homepage.lead: libkungfu publishes typed runtime frames into an append-only memory-mapped journal. Hub interfaces, supervisors, replay readers, and co-located workers can inspect the same retained stream without adding a broker or a duplicate event pipeline to the writer path.
homepage.claimBoundary: The shared-memory publish protocol and multi-process reader path are implemented. Hub-specific payload capture, broad end-to-end performance qualification, durable production ingest, replication, and HA remain separately qualified capabilities.

writer.label: Agent worker
writer.detail: Appends action, lifecycle, and telemetry frames once.

journal.label: Append-only mmap Episode journal
journal.detail: One published frame stream is retained evidence and the local reader bus.

readers.label: Hub live tail
readers.detail: Observe published frames without a second event pipeline.

readers.label: Supervisor
readers.detail: Read heartbeat and progress without interrupting the worker.

readers.label: Rewind + replay
readers.detail: Reopen retained evidence at a qualified frontier.

readers.label: Local readers
readers.detail: Fan out one published stream to co-located consumers.

outcomes.title: Storage is the bus
outcomes.summary: The journal is not copied into a second transport just to become observable. Retained frames are the local read surface.

outcomes.title: Observation stays off the writer path
outcomes.summary: Readers attach to published mmap pages, so each observer does not require a new writer-side copy or broker hop.

outcomes.title: Recovery starts from retained truth
outcomes.summary: After failure, resume from the last qualified published or durable frontier and classify any unacknowledged tail explicitly.

semanticBoundary.heading: Frames record what happened. Policy decides what it means.
semanticBoundary.body: The journal carries ordered evidence. KFD and each Hub's local policy define authority, admission, completion, and what may safely happen next.

frontiers.label: visible
frontiers.summary: A complete frame is published and available to declared live readers.

frontiers.label: durable_group
frontiers.summary: A frame is at or below a selected batch durable watermark. Production durable ingest remains disabled.

frontiers.label: durable_sync
frontiers.summary: Required data and metadata cross a named local durability barrier. Production durable ingest remains disabled.

frontiers.label: replicated
frontiers.summary: A separate replication policy acknowledges the frame; this is not a current implementation target.

qualificationBoundary.heading: What this page claims — and what it does not
claims: The mmap MAP_SHARED publish barrier is implemented for a single writer and multiple cross-process readers.
The production mapping profile currently qualifies visibility; durable requests remain fail-closed unless a named candidate path is selected.
The current reference Hub adapter carries lifecycle metadata, not prompt, tool, token, provider payloads, or private journal bytes.
The wider visible typed-agent and multi-reader product surfaces remain separate end-to-end admission work.

sourceContract.heading: Spec and source contract
sourceContract.summary: This secondary fixture preserves the future @kungfu-tech/spec handoff without making a placeholder package the homepage narrative.

sections.title: Runtime fact ledger
sections.summary: Event-stream facts, provenance, captured boundaries, and replay anchors for local runtimes.

sections.title: Yijinjing core
sections.summary: Static core boundary for the runtime fact ledger substrate.

sections.title: Schema registry
sections.summary: Versioned schemas and conformance vectors generated from the Kungfu core source.
